sections.heading: Overview
sections.content:
# CRYPTO BRIEF
07 June 2026 • 06:08 CET

## Crypto Markets — Session Overview

Digital assets stage modest technical bounce following brutal weekly selloff, with Bitcoin reclaiming $61,688 (+1.26%) and Ethereum holding $1,600 (+1.24%). Seven-day losses remain severe across the board—BTC down 13.51%, ETH bleeding 20.10%—signaling persistent institutional deleveraging. ETH/BTC spread compression at -0.01% confirms high cross-asset correlation typical of risk-off liquidation cascades. Despite daily green candles, market structure remains fragile with thin conviction.

## Bitcoin — Dominant Narrative

BTC consolidates above critical $60,000 psychological support after testing $58,500 during Asian hours. Current pric

sections.heading: Analysis
sections.content:
e of $61,688 sits below reclaimed 200-day moving average near $64,200, establishing resistance. Volume profile suggests accumulation from macro funds near current levels, though weekly close below $62,000 would confirm bearish continuation. Daily sentiment flips bullish above 1%, but lacks follow-through buying.

## Ethereum and DeFi

Ethereum's 20.10% weekly decline outpaces Bitcoin, reflecting Layer 2 migration concerns and staking yield compression. At $1,600, ETH tests November 2023 lows. DeFi TVL contraction accelerates as protocols face liquidity exodus. Layer 2 solutions show resilience but insufficient to offset mainnet weakness.

## Altcoins — Capital Rotation

Major L1s exhibit deeper drawdowns: Solana

sections.heading: Outlook
sections.content:
$64.18 (-20.85% weekly), Cardano $0.1605 (-30.38%), Avalanche $6.74 (-24.40%). Chainlink outperforms at $7.61 (+3.57% daily), suggesting oracle demand persists. XRP holds $1.12 on regulatory optimism. Even memecoins bounce: Dogecoin $0.0838 (+3.04%).

## On-chain and Sentiment

Funding rates normalize post-liquidation event. Fear/greed index remains deeply oversold, historically bullish contrarian signal.

## Trade Ideas

LONG: Bitcoin $60,000-$62,000 range, Chainlink momentum continuation, Zcash $412 (+5.80% daily) privacy rotation.

SHORT/AVOID: Cardano structural weakness, Avalanche below $7.00, overleveraged DeFi tokens.

## Risks

Equity correlation breakdown, regulatory intervention, further ETF outflows.
